channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Add a Little Whimsy to Your Study Routine: Silent Reads @ Folsom Library on July 15th
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 15th, 2026, from 2 pm – 4 pm. Join RPI Libraries for a study break with our July Silent Reads on July 15th— a relaxed, low-pressure gathering where people read together in silence. No discussions, no pressure, just a calm space to settle in with a good book or some coursework. If you’re not feeling reading that day, you can use the space for puzzles, crafts, or try out a new study location. Please visit the full announcement to RSVP for event updates!
item.author: Students

item.title: Planning Ahead: iClicker Support Concludes January 2027
item.description: iClicker will no longer be a supported campus tool as of January 2027 starting in the spring term. For those that may still be using iClicker, we recommend using Slido which is currently the supported polling tool on campus.
item.author: Community

item.title: Gone Phishing: Report the Phish, Reel in the Rewards!
item.description: For the month of August, our Information Security team is having a contest for the Top 3 Students, Faculty, or Staff that report Phishing and Spam emails to our AI Security Analyst: PhishStick. Top three reporters will win prizes including RPI Merchandise and custom vinyl stickers from our Information Security team!
item.author: Community

item.title: Houston Field House Scheduled Power Shutdown – July 17
item.description: A scheduled power shutdown will occur at the Houston Field House beginning at 7:00 a.m. on Friday, July 17, 2026. The building will operate on limited backup generator power for the remainder of the day while electrical work is completed. Some building systems and services may be affected during this time. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
item.author: Community

item.title: Information Security - New Feature - Abnormal AI Daily Email Digest
item.description: Effective July 15th, 2026, our Information Security team has enabled Abnormal Email Digest for our RPI Community. This digest will send a daily summary report of actions our email protection system took to remediate malicious emails before reaching RPI mailboxes. Please click this link to view additional information including our FAQ Article in ITSSC.
item.author: Community

item.title: Summer I & III 2026 End of Term Course Surveys in HelioCampus: Adding Additional Questions to a Course Section (Faculty/Instructor Training)
item.description:
Date: Friday, July 17, 2026 10:30 AM - 11:00 AM - This webinar offers faculty/instructors of course sections to add additional questions to their student end of term course evaluations. This is an optional process and only needed if instructors wanted to add other questions than what is on the institute course evaluation. Please click the link in the See section to register for the session.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
